name: Golden Monkey Ring
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare the dough as you would for any yeast bread and cover. Let it rise until doubled in size.
2. In a bowl, mix together 1 cup of sugar, 3/4 cup of brown sugar, and 2 teaspoons of cinnamon.
3. Grease a 10-inch tube pan heavily with butter.
4. Tear the dough into golf ball-sized pieces. Dip each piece into melted butter, then coat in the sugar mixture.
5. Place the coated dough pieces in the tube pan to form one layer. Sprinkle with chopped nuts and continue coating until all dough is used. Sprinkle any remaining sugar and nuts over the top.
6. Let rise until ready to bake.
7. Preheat the oven to 350°F (175°C).
8. Bake for 1 hour, covering if necessary to prevent excessive browning.
